creator: toshi@ruby.ocn.ne.jp
text:
MLO (X-Loader) identifies a board at boot and I think that we need a version after 7 Mar commit[1] to boot PocketBeagle.  So, would you update to coming v2018.05?  (I didn't build it, only tested using binary [2] mentioned [3].)

This port is also used for release image build (src/release/arm/BEAGLEBONE.conf), so timely update would be good for other am335x variant boards to utilize existent BEAGLEBONE binary.

[1] https://github.com/u-boot/u-boot/commit/eff0c977b3b9466657362869e04da231a892e31e#diff-f50a648de8254edc812f2e46e180921f
[2] http://www.netbsd.org/~sevan/pocketbeagle-ub-2017-09.tgz
[3] https://mail-index.netbsd.org/port-arm/2017/10/23/msg004423.html
